title: Extra Select Big Heart Shaped Dog Treat Biscuits in a 1ltr Bucket (approx 10 biscuits)
availability_text: Only 15 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Our large dog treats are just the right size for bigger breeds, making them perfect dog treats for training sessions or as rewarding doggy treats.
These dog treat biscuits offer satisfying crunchy big bites, doggie treats for hungry pets to ensure their dog snacks keep them satisfied.
Celebrate special moments with our heart shapes dog biscuits, the ideal Valentines dog treats to express your love during holidays or any cherished occasion.
From daily training dog treats to nightly dog bedtime biscuits, our healthy dog treats for medium dogs & large breeds are great from dawn till dusk.
For when they crave dog treats, keep them fresh and tasty with our resealable dog treat storage which offers easy access during any adventure.
description: From the manufacturer Extra Select - Big Hearts How to Feed? These big hearts are suitable for dogs over 12 weeks of age and serve as an excellent snack or training reward. To ensure a balanced diet, adjust your dog's meal portions accordingly. Always provide fresh drinking water and store the treats in a cool, dry place for maximum freshness. Nutrition Protein 12.9%, Fat 6.8%, Ash 6.3%, Fibre 4.9%, Moisture 12% Cereals, Meat and Animal Derivatives, Minerals, Vegetable Derivatives, Oils and Fats Tips for Treats Supervised Snacking: Watch your dog while they enjoy their Gravy Bones. Balanced Diet: Remember, treats should only be a small part of a balanced diet. Age Appropriate: Suitable for dogs over 12 weeks old. Big Hearts Big bites for big dogs! For those pooches looking for something substantial to snack on, these large baked biscuits are a delicious and crunchy treat to be given as a reward, as a bedtime treat, or just because. Nutritionally Valuable With a good balance of crude protein and fats, our heart biscuits contribute to your dog's daily nutrient intake. They contain 13.9% protein, complemented by a 6.8% fat content for satiety and coat health. Convenient Training Aid These big bites are more than just a tasty treat; they also serve as a helpful training aid. The convenient shape makes them easy to carry and dispense, making your training sessions as smooth as possible.
